01-Spring-boot-overview/1.actuatorapp/po.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
01-Spring-boot-overview/1.actuatorapp/po.why_exists: The project is being migrated to JDK 21; keeping java.version at 17 would result in the application running on or being compiled for Java 17 features, failing to utilize or comply with the target JDK 21 environment.
